notes: All 64 entries are UI text (block view status / button / tooltip / error text + settings descriptions surfaced in the settings page). No panic / telemetry / doc-comment / search_terms hits. 'Warping...' kept as 'Warping……' (Warp brand verb-form preserved in source per glossary). Settings page descriptions translated as full sentences ending in '。'. '\"What's new\"' kept quoted English (UI section name string referenced literally elsewhere). Preserved all {placeholder} tokens, brand literals (Warp, Warp Drive, MCP, AWS, Bedrock, Agent, API), and \n\n newline shape in multiline error messages.
